thread.title: Pray, Fast and Intercede as Nuclear Christmas Nears
thread.title_full: Pray, Fast and Intercede as Nuclear Christmas Nears

author: Troy Anderson
title: Pray, Fast and Intercede as Nuclear Christmas Nears
text:
Pray, Fast and Intercede as Nuclear Christmas Nears
As I write this, the world finds itself in growing peril. The chilling warning from pro-Vladimir Putin spokesmen Sergey Markov about the potential for [nuclear war](https://charismanews.com/news/russia-strikes-back-us-closes-kyiv-embassy/) by Christmas is a wake-up call of historic proportions. These are not just the usual geopolitical rumblings—these are signs of the times, and we must take them seriously.
Over the past few days, news has emerged that Ukraine has been granted permission to use long-range missiles capable of striking deep into Russian territory. This decision comes after President Joe Biden approved Ukraine’s use of ATACMS, UK Storm Shadow missiles and French Scalp missiles. While some view this as a strategic move to put pressure on Russia, [the Kremlin’s response](https://mycharisma.com/culture/russia-retaliates-as-us-shuts-down-embassy-in-kyiv/) has escalated the stakes to a horrifying level. Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov has accused the West of direct involvement, claiming these missile strikes signal a joint attack by NATO.
[Breaking News](https://www.youtube.com/@CharismaMedia).[ Spirit-Filled Stories](https://www.youtube.com/@CharismaMedia). Subscribe to Charisma on YouTube now!
Markov’s chilling warning on BBC Radio 4—that this move by Western allies is not a step but a “big jump” toward nuclear catastrophe—has heightened global concerns. He suggested that Britain and even the United States could become nuclear targets. Meanwhile, Russian President Putin recently signed a decree updating the nation’s nuclear doctrine, reserving the right to use nuclear weapons against conventional attacks supported by nuclear states. This doctrine, along with the Kremlin’s rhetoric, signals that we are perilously close to the unthinkable: the possibility of a global nuclear conflict.
Russia’s Threat of a Nuclear Christmas
[Get your FREE CHARISMA NEWSLETTERS today! Stay up to date with current issues, Holy Spirit news, Christian teachings, Charisma videos & more!](https://www.strangmail.com/newsletters/signup/)
Markov, a key Putin ally, described this Christmas as a potential turning point in human history. His warning that Britons may need to spend the holiday season in bomb shelters and that Russia views missile strikes into its territory as a direct attack from NATO underscores the stakes of this moment. Recent reports indicate that Ukraine fired six ATACMS missiles at Russian territory just days after Biden’s green light, with Russian air defenses managing to shoot down five and damage the sixth.
[Order your copy of Troy Anderson’s “The Trump Code” at Amazon.com today!](https://www.amazon.com/Trump-Code-Exploring-Travel-Lineage/dp/1636414397)
The implications of these actions are enormous. Russia has begun producing mobile bomb shelters designed to protect against nuclear fallout, a clear indication of how seriously the Kremlin is taking these developments. Lavrov’s comments further underscore Russia’s position: the missiles fired into Russian territory are seen as a joint attack by Ukraine and the West, justifying a potential nuclear response.
